question: Will Max Verstappen win 4 of the opening 10 races of the 2026 F1 Season?
reason: Verstappen has not won any of the first four races in the 2026 season.
evidence: Verstappen's best finish is 5th place in the first four races.
The 2026 season has 22 races, with 18 remaining after the first four.
Verstappen needs to win four of the remaining 18 races to meet the market criteria.
